title: Cauthon World Border Pearl Blocker
description: blocks pearl glitching in the world border
body:
## Features
1. Ender Pearl Teleportation Block: Prevents players from using Ender Pearls to teleport beyond the world border.
2. World Border Compliance: Ensures teleportation stays within the world’s defined border by applying a check on the teleportation destination.
3. Buffer Zone: The plugin adds a 1-block buffer to prevent players from teleporting right at the edge of the border.

We have a discord now!!! [https://discord.gg/62493Tu5AD](https://discord.gg/62493Tu5AD)
